items.title: Our readers get a Prime Day exclusive chance to score Yozma’s IN 10 electric dirt bike starting from a new $879 low
items.summary: Wellbots has given us some exclusive deals for the best prices to date on the Yozma IN 10 Electric Dirt Bike (red colorway) for $879 shipped, after using the code 220YOZ9TO5 at checkout, while the black colorway counterpart is down to $979 shipped, after using the same code. While it carries a $1,599 MSRP directly from Yozma, it’s dropping down from $1,199 here. We previously secured a similar exclusive deal on this model back at the end of April, which saw the costs taken down to the former $999 low. Now, though, if you missed out there, you’ll be getting an even larger discount of either $320 or $220 ($720 or $620 off the direct MSRP) for the newest and best prices we have seen for either colorway.

items.title: Sharge’s regularly $80 4-in-1 wireless desktop charger with 15W Qi2 just plunged to $23 (New low, 71% off)
items.summary: Courtesy of Sharge’s official Amazon storefront, you can now score its 4-in-1 GaN desktop charger with a Qi2 15W wireless charging pad for $22.90 with free shipping for Prime members or in orders over $35. This is regularly a $80 charging unit, so you’re looking at a whopping 71% discount on it today. It has only seen a handful of discounts since its debut earlier this year, with its most notable one being the one that had it down at $30 last week. Today’s offer beats that price to land it $7 below that to mark a new all-time low.

items.title: LEGO has unveiled the wild and unique 4,104-piece Technic Koenigsegg Sadair’s Spear Megacar
items.summary: If you’re a fan of supercars, LEGO has unveiled a new building set that will likely get you roaring as loudly as its real-life counterpart’s engine, and you won’t have to wait long to add it to your collection. The LEGO Technic 42232 Koenigsegg Sadair’s Spear Megacar is quite the wild 1:8 scale set and I’m sure it will become a staple in many collections once it hits the market, complete with a dedicated GWP during the first six days of its release. Head below to learn more and check out all the collected photos.

items.title: Lenovo’s new 2026 Yoga 7a 2-in-1 touchscreen OLED Copilot+ PC is $400 off today (All-time low)
items.summary: Alongside its now live Father’s Day sale, and as part of its Deals of the Day lineup, Best Buy is offering Lenovo’s latest Yoga 7a 2-in-1 touchscreen Copilot+ PC for $799.99 shipped. This is one of the brand’s newest Windows laptops that hit the scene earlier this year with a Ryzen AI 5 430 quad-core processor, carrying a $1,200 price tag. Lenovo currently has it for $1,147.50 as part of its Weekly deals, but Best Buy’s offer beats that with a huge $400 discount on its usual price. Not only is it the first notable offer we’re tracking for this notebook, but it’s also the lowest we have seen it drop to date.

It’s been sitting at $229 since the debut of Osmo Action 6 earlier this year, so you’re looking at a $60 discount on it today. Today’s deal marks the lowest price we’ve tracked for this set to date, making it the most affordable way to pick up one of DJI’s capable action cameras.
